problem id: ba409835
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  01110100 -> 00000011
  00011011 -> 11000000
  00100111 -> 11000001
  11101001 -> 01000111
  11101100 -> 00000111
  11111000 -> 00000111
  11001000 -> 00000110
  01111011 -> 11000011
  11101101 -> 01000111
  10111000 -> 00000101

query: 11010111
predicted answer: 11000110
